title: Swing High, Swing Low
writer: Virginia Van Upp, Oscar Hammerstein II, George Manker Watters
actors: Carole Lombard, Fred MacMurray, Charles Butterworth
plot: A hair-dresser stranded in Panama moves in with an ex-soldier and his hypochondriac roommate; she and the former fall in love, but their romance is threatened by success and the arrival of his old flame.
